_note: Phase 6 (v0.1.0 launch) — ctaUrls below are real vendor PUBLIC LANDING PAGES, NOT affiliate links. Commission is forfeit on these clicks. Once partner programs approve, swap each ctaUrl to the tracked outboundUrlTemplate value (already encoded with utm placeholders). `affiliateProgramStatus` flags which entries are still pending approval. UX-equivalent for users; revenue gap accepted to ship.
